source: live CDP inspect of https://m.bunjang.co.kr/ (mobile UA 390x844 dpr=3) + desktop 1280x713 dpr=2
method: Chrome DevTools Protocol Runtime.evaluate — getComputedStyle on document.documentElement (CSS custom properties) + 200+ DOM samples across header / nav / card / button / footer / price / badge nodes

primary._source: --color-primary (Bunjang Red — used on primary CTA buttons: '앱 다운로드', '번개장터 앱으로 시작하기'; verified getComputedStyle backgroundColor=rgb(216,12,24) on a._variant-primary_1cw4e_30)

specialty._source: --color-care-* (likely warm warning / cherished-item tier) and --color-safe-* (likely escrow / safe-payment tier — bunjang has 번개페이/번개케어 services)

family._source: getComputedStyle fontFamily on body / button / input / span / p — 100% of 125 sampled nodes
family._note: no custom display face; Pretendard Variable carries 100% of UI text (Korean + Latin)

scale_observed.20px: section title — fontWeight 700 (e.g. category headers, '오늘의 추천 아이템')
scale_observed.16px: default body / button label — fontWeight 400 (CTA copy '앱 다운로드'), fontWeight 700 (price '600,000원' on product card)
scale_observed.14px: product title in card — fontWeight 500, color gray-600 #666
scale_observed.12px: meta / timestamp / chip — fontWeight 500, color gray-300 #999 ('19시간 전')

weight._note: no 600 observed in sampled set; jump from 500 → 700

typography.lineHeight: predominantly 'normal' (browser default); explicit 18px on search input

radius._source: getComputedStyle borderRadius across 125 mobile + 86 desktop samples + --bun-ui-radius-pill: 999px
radius._usage: 4px = small badge button (앱 다운로드 chip); 6px = primary CTA + thumbnail container (--radiusVar__1j9duj80 inline on ThumbnailContainer); 20px = soft chips / large pills; 999px = circular icon button / heart button

elevation._observed: no boxShadow on any sampled element — Bunjang relies on borders + background-tint, not shadow, for depth.
elevation.border-soft: 1px solid #e5e5e5 (gray-100) — used on secondary buttons like '로그인/회원가입' (border rgb(229,229,229))

aspect._source: --bun-ui-aspect-ratio-vertical / --bun-ui-aspect-ratio-square — every product image uses 81:100 portrait crop

safe-area._note: iOS notch/home-indicator insets — all default 0 on emulated desktop; populate at runtime on real iPhone

internal-ds.name: Bun UI (internal)
internal-ds.evidence: --bun-ui-{radius-pill|aspect-ratio-*|sat|sab|sal|sar} CSS variable prefix on :root; vanilla-extract class-name patterns (Box__7nn0kn17, Flex__wsrgth3, Typography_typography__1wr8iu13)
internal-ds._note: no public Storybook, no public npm package, no documentation site as of 2026-05-14
